channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Possible boat explosion sends over a dozen people to the hospital: Fire officials
item.description: Over a dozen people were rushed to a hospital following a possible boat explosion near Miami Saturday afternoon, fire officials said.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: Spanish authorities preparing for M/V Hondius arrival
item.description: The M/V Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: U.S. awaits Iran's response on peace deal as month-long ceasefire holds
item.description: The U.S. military says its forces fired on two Iran-flagged oil tankers to stop them from docking at an Iranian port in violation of the U.S. blockade...

item.title: What to know about the latest wave of changes to congressional districts
